name: Suspicious Elevated System Shell
notes:
This rule triggers when a shell program such as the windows Command Prompt or PowerShell is launched with system privileges.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113, Tim Shelton (update fp)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Elevated System Shell
SIGMA Description: Detects when a shell program such as the windows Command Prompt or PowerShell is launched with system privileges.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [powershell.exe or pwsh.exe or cmd.exe]
when the event matches Username is any of [AUTHORI or AUTORI]
when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) contains any of [C:\Windows\System32\ or C:\Program Files (x86)\ or C:\Program Files\], Process Name (custom) is any of [cmd.exe or powershell.exe]
when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) is any of C:\ManageEngine\ADManager Plus\pgsql\bin\postgres.exe, Process Name (custom) is any of cmd.exe

when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) contains any of C:\Windows\SysWOW64\config\systemprofile\Citrix\UpdaterBinaries\, Parent Process Name (custom) is any of CitrixReceiverUpdater.exe, Process Name (custom) is any of cmd.exe
when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of python.exe, Command (custom) is any of C:\WINDOWS\system32\cmd.exe /c "ver"

when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) contains any of C:\Windows\Temp, Parent Process Name (custom) is any of invcol.exe, Parent Command (custom) contains any of C:\ProgramData\Dell\UpdateService\, Process Name (custom) is any of cmd.exe
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Restricted -Command Write-Host 'Final result: 1';
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Elevated System Shell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [powershell.exe or pwsh.exe or cmd.exe]
AND when the event matches Username is any of [AUTHORI or AUTORI]

AND NOT when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) contains any of [C:\Windows\System32\ or C:\Program Files (x86)\ or C:\Program Files\], Process Name (custom) is any of [cmd.exe or powershell.exe]
AND NOT when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) is any of C:\ManageEngine\ADManager Plus\pgsql\bin\postgres.exe, Process Name (custom) is any of cmd.exe

AND NOT when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) contains any of C:\Windows\SysWOW64\config\systemprofile\Citrix\UpdaterBinaries\, Parent Process Name (custom) is any of CitrixReceiverUpdater.exe, Process Name (custom) is any of cmd.exe
AND NOT when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of python.exe, Command (custom) is any of C:\WINDOWS\system32\cmd.exe /c "ver"

AND NOT when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) contains any of C:\Windows\Temp, Parent Process Name (custom) is any of invcol.exe, Parent Command (custom) contains any of C:\ProgramData\Dell\UpdateService\, Process Name (custom) is any of cmd.exe
AND NOT when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Restricted -Command Write-Host 'Final result: 1';
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Elevated System Shell
Event description: Detects when a shell program such as the windows Command Prompt or PowerShell is launched with system privileges.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
